functions.name: download_sources
functions.purpose: Downloads the OEVK JSON and the Address ZIP file from their source URLs.

parameters.name: sources
parameters.description: A dictionary containing the URLs for 'oevk_json' and 'korzet_zip'.

parameters.name: staging_dir
parameters.description: The directory path to save the downloaded files.

returns.description: A dictionary with the local file paths for 'oevk_json' and 'korzet_zip'.

functions.name: load_staging_data
functions.purpose: Loads the downloaded and unzipped data into staging tables in DuckDB.

parameters.name: file_paths
parameters.description: A dictionary with local paths to 'oevk_json' and the unzipped address CSV.

parameters.name: run_tag
parameters.description: A tag (e.g., timestamp) to identify the current run in the staging tables.

returns.description: This function does not return a value but populates staging tables.
